patch.value:
## Context
Actual .agents/pm/ contains: checkpoints/, chores/, decisions/, epics/, extensions/, features/, history/, issues/, locks/, milestones/, plans/, runtime/, schema/, search/, settings.json, stories/, tasks/.

Docs/ARCHITECTURE.md (lines 82-99) shows only the older subset, missing plans/, stories/, schema/, checkpoints/, runtime/.

## Acceptance criteria
- docs/ARCHITECTURE.md storage layout section lists all current .agents/pm/ subdirectories
- Each new directory has a one-line description of its contents
- CI docs-links gate stays green after the change

## Evidence
docs/ARCHITECTURE.md lines 82-99; ls .agents/pm/ output
Fix ARCHITECTURE.md storage layout: add plans/, stories/, schema/, checkpoints/, runtime/ dirs

The .agents/pm/ storage layout documented in docs/ARCHITECTURE.md is stale. The actual directory tree includes plans/, stories/, schema/, checkpoints/, and runtime/ which are absent from the documented listing. Agents relying on the architecture docs will have an incomplete picture of the data layout.

- docs/ARCHITECTURE.md storage layout section lists all current .agents/pm/ subdirectories
- Each new directory has a one-line description of its contents
- CI docs-links gate stays green after the change

value.note: Storage layout: removed index/, added plans/stories/schema/checkpoints/runtime/ + on-demand-folder note

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Fixed Storage Layout tree in docs/ARCHITECTURE.md: removed legacy index/, added plans/, stories/, schema/, checkpoints/, runtime/ with an explanatory note on on-demand type folders and rebuildable vs required data. Implemented in PR (docs accuracy & contributor-reference hardening). Verified: docs-skills-gate passed (relative links incl .toon validated), docs-skills-gate.spec + guide-command.spec + files-docs-command.spec = 66 passed, quality:static passed, manual temp-dir init confirms 11 builtins incl Plan and real dirs plans/schema/runtime (no index/).

patch.value: ARCHITECTURE.md storage layout now matches the runtime .agents/pm tree (index/ removed; plans/stories/schema/checkpoints/runtime/ documented).
Storage layout drift fixed and verified against a fresh temp-dir init.
